reason: Functional archive traversal and block decompression (LZ4/LZMA) implemented.
Supports DDS/TGA headers. PNG conversion is missing; exports raw data with custom headers.
Exports vertices and faces to OBJ. Normals and UVs are parsed but not currently written to the output file.
WAV header generated, but channels and frequency are currently hardcoded to 2/44100 instead of using parsed metadata.
Transform and GameObject relationship mapping is functional.
Stub implementation; only parses the asset name.
Exports raw shader bytecode blobs without disassembly or metadata.
Basic structural parsing exists but lacks version-specific branching for metadata < v24.
Cross-process memory reading for Windows and Linux/Android implemented.
JNI initialization and VM attachment functional.
